name: Venomous Blast
statusOutcome: [AttackerName] stands upright, leaning back with a growling hiss before she darts forward and her mouth and jaw both split open as she spews a blob of venomous aphrodisiac right at [ThePlayerName]! But [TargetHeOrShe] can't manage to avoid it in time, and shudders as heat starts to flood [TargetHisOrHer] body with arousal, the aphrodisiac soaking into [TargetHisOrHer] body.
statusMiss: [AttackerName] stands upright, leaning back with a growling hiss before she darts forward and her mouth and jaw both split open as she spews a blob of venomous aphrodisiac right at [ThePlayerName]! But [TargetHeOrShe] manages to completely avoid it!
